question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the chapters (e.g., Chapter 1, Chapter 2). Instead, it describes the scope of the work. It would be better to explicitly mention the division into theoretical and practical parts or specific chapters.

question: Description
feedback: The text does a good job of describing the content of the research, specifically mentioning the methods (Slack Space, string replacement, DLL injection) and the goals of the practical part.

question: Structure
feedback: The general flow of the thesis is understandable (research of format -> analysis of methods -> practical implementation -> evaluation), which allows the reader to grasp the logical progression of the work.
